name: Verify autocomplete search suggestions for products
description: The test validates the search autocomplete API by sending a partial product name. It verifies that the service returns a structured response with the correct number of items, and checks that every suggested product matches the requested search term (case-insensitive)
descriptionHtml: The test validates the search autocomplete API by sending a partial product name. It verifies that the service returns a structured response with the correct number of items, and checks that every suggested product matches the requested search term (case-insensitive)

testStage.description: The test validates the search autocomplete API by sending a partial product name. It verifies that the service returns a structured response with the correct number of items, and checks that every suggested product matches the requested search term (case-insensitive)

steps.name: Send an API request to search by the word: 'Java'
Verify that the server returned a successful, non-empty response
Verify that exactly 6 products were returned in the response
Verify that each found product contains the text 'Java' (case-insensitive)
